videos.title: Brawl is the best MTG format and you should be playing it
videos.description:
Get your holiday gifts for gamers at https://www.coolstuffinc.com/cgb promo code CGB.  Jace, Vryn's Prodigy is an awesome mono blue extra turns control deck for the MTG Arena Brawl format.  But don't expect to make any friends :)

Decklist - https://www.moxfield.com/decks/neaAdqLYOEqSwiednU7VuQ

videos.title: Rarran and Crim talk Project K  CovertGoPodcast
videos.description:
League of Legends is launching a card game, Project K, and the first cards have been revealed.  The Bazaar is Reynad's big new auto-battler and @Rarran is terribly addicted.
